case_title: KING, ARTHUR DBA ARTDESIGNS VS. YENS INC. DBA IMPERIAL GARDEN SEAFOOD RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, ARTHUR DBA ARTDESIGNS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YENS INC. DBA IMPERIAL GARDEN SEAFOOD RESTAURANT $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE S.F. SHERIFF DEPARTMENT. WRIT BEING RECALLED WAS NEVER FILED WITH THE SHERIFF.
ORDER TO RECALL WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON JULY 10, 2009.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
